channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: James Murdoch may have earned up to $7.5 billion from pre-IPO SpaceX investment
item.description: His early bet on the rocket company likely made him far wealthier than his father Rupert Murdoch.

item.title: Three reasons Bitcoin remains in a bear market, with a possible rebound to $100,000
item.description: Rising inflation, the four-year cycle, and excess leverage continue to pressure the cryptocurrency.

item.title: Former U.S. soccer player builds $20 billion company, credits resilience over talent
item.description: Jim Kavanaugh says habits from his athletic career helped him build World Wide Technology.

item.title: A Yale professor says America is now an 'oldigarchy'—and Boomers on LinkedIn are enraged
item.description: Yale professor Samuel Moyn argues that the wealthy are predominantly old, a claim explored in his new book 'Gerontocracy in America.'
